title: brathys connata
intro: Brathys connata, also known as the starfruit, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae and is native to tropical regions. The medicinal properties of Brathys connata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of consuming Brathys connata include reducing stress, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Brathys connata can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
